qwen3.justification: Disables hidden chain-of-thought to prevent exhausting token budget on invisible reasoning. Without this, qwen3 consumes the entire num_predict budget on internal deliberation before producing any visible output.

phi3.justification: Phi3:3.8b produces degenerate/empty outputs at num_ctx=4096 in ~38% of responses. Larger context window reduces truncation and allows the model to complete its FINAL_ANSWER line.
